requirements.title: Secure User Login
requirements.description: The system must allow registered users to authenticate securely using an email and password. Upon successful authentication, the system must generate a secure JWT token and redirect the user to the main dashboard screen.

test_cases.name: Test Secure User Login
test_cases.description: Automated test for Secure User Login
test_cases.expected_result: Secure User Login should work correctly

requirements.title: Flutter VM Service Connection
requirements.description: The local runner must accept a valid WebSocket URI pointing to a running Flutter application's VM Service. The system must validate the connection handshake before enabling any live runtime interactions.

test_cases.name: Test Flutter VM Service Connection
test_cases.description: Automated test for Flutter VM Service Connection
test_cases.expected_result: Flutter VM Service Connection should work correctly

requirements.title: Live UI Inspection
requirements.description: The core engine must query the running Flutter app via Marionette to retrieve a list of interactive UI elements. Layout-only widgets like Paddings or Spacers must be filtered out locally to minimize token overhead.

test_cases.name: Test Live UI Inspection
test_cases.description: Automated test for Live UI Inspection
test_cases.expected_result: Live UI Inspection should work correctly

requirements.title: Autonomous Action Execution
requirements.description: Based on the AI model decision, the orchestrator must command the remote app to simulate user gestures including tap actions, text inputs into text fields, and scrolling routines.

test_cases.name: Test Autonomous Action Execution
test_cases.description: Automated test for Autonomous Action Execution
test_cases.expected_result: Autonomous Action Execution should work correctly

requirements.title: Trello Ticket Generation
requirements.description: When an unexpected error or assertion failure is captured during a test run, the system must automatically create a new card in the user's configured Trello board under the 'Bug Reports' list.

test_cases.name: Test Trello Ticket Generation
test_cases.description: Automated test for Trello Ticket Generation
test_cases.expected_result: Trello Ticket Generation should work correctly

requirements.title: GitHub Issue Dispatch
requirements.description: The system must format error logs and failure context into Markdown syntax and automatically open a new issue in the specified GitHub repository containing the requirement traceability tracking tags.

test_cases.name: Test GitHub Issue Dispatch
test_cases.description: Automated test for GitHub Issue Dispatch
test_cases.expected_result: GitHub Issue Dispatch should work correctly
